calendar.matters:
FAMILY LAW DISPOSITION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terry Thompson for (petitioner) Robin Bishop. Jillian Somers Donovan for (respondents) CPMC-St. Lukes Hospital.

Mr. Thompson reported that the patient is still in the hospital, that she is doing well, that the hospital provided a list of facilities that have sub-acute care and that Robin has been reaching out to the facilities.

The Court stated that it does not want to disrupt any efforts to find placement, that the hospital has complied with the probate code and that the procedural defect has now been cured. Ms. Donovan stated that the hospital has complied with the code.

The Court ordered Ms. Donovan to provide and order approved as to form by Friday, October 28, 2016 by noon to Department 204. Furthermore the Court stated that Mr. Thompson can withdraw Barbara from CPMC or seek emergency relief by appealing this order.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Nancy Wong. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

For Emergency Temporary Order Authorizing Medical Treatment And Authorizing Petitioner To Give Consent To Medical Treatment
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Continued To Oct-27-16 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204
